queries: Data Cleaning Techniques for Robust E2E Pipelines 2024
action.query: Data Cleaning Techniques for Robust E2E Pipelines 2024

annotations.title: 5 Data Cleaning Techniques for High-Performing Pipelines
Data cleaning techniques: methods, steps, and best practices (2026)
Data Cleaning: Techniques, Benefits, and Real-World Examples for Reliable Analytics
How data cleaning boosts transformation quality and reliability | dbt Labs
Developing a Robust Data Quality Strategy for Your Data Pipeline Workflows
REIN: A Comprehensive Benchmark Framework for Data Cleaning Methods in ML Pipelines
Step-E: A Differentiable Data Cleaning Framework for Robust Learning with Noisy Labels
AlphaClean: Automatic Generation of Data Cleaning Pipelines

content.text:
Ensuring robust end-to-end (E2E) data pipelines requires effective data cleaning techniques to maintain data quality and reliability. Here are several authoritative and recent sources that discuss various aspects of data cleaning for E2E pipelines:

1. **"Data Cleaning Techniques for High-Performing Pipelines" by Fivetran**: This article outlines modern tools and methods for automating data cleaning, emphasizing the importance of validation, monitoring, and automation in data pipelines. It discusses tools like Fivetran, pandas, dbt, and Great Expectations, highlighting their roles in data loading, preparation, transformation, validation, and monitoring. ([fivetran.com](https://www.fivetran.com/learn/data-cleaning-techniques?utm_source=openai))

2. **"Data Cleaning Techniques: Methods, Steps, and Best Practices" by OvalEdge**: This resource provides a comprehensive overview of data cleaning methods tailored to different data types and use cases. It covers cleaning structured and semi-structured data, data preprocessing for machine learning, and emphasizes the importance of data validation and quality checks to ensure data reliability. ([ovaledge.com](https://www.ovaledge.com/blog/data-cleaning-techniques?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Data Cleaning: Techniques, Benefits, and Real-World Examples for Reliable Analytics" by Domo**: This article discusses the significance of data cleaning in analytics, including real-time data cleaning approaches. It highlights the need for real-time data cleaning in fast-paced environments and the role of streaming data platforms in supporting inline data validation and transformation. ([domo.com](https://www.domo.com/glossary/data-cleaning?utm_source=openai))

4. **"How Data Cleaning Boosts Transformation Quality and Reliability" by dbt Labs**: This piece explores how data cleaning enhances the quality and reliability of data transformations. It discusses the integration of cleaning with normalization and validation processes, emphasizing the benefits of clean data in transformation pipelines and the importance of embedding cleaning logic within transformation workflows. ([getdbt.com](https://www.getdbt.com/blog/data-cleaning-transformation-quality?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Developing a Robust Data Quality Strategy for Your Data Pipeline Workflows" by Eckerson Group**: This article emphasizes the importance of a comprehensive data quality strategy in data pipelines. It discusses testing functions that support data extractions, transformations, processing, and loading, and the necessity of assessing data accuracy and completeness throughout the pipeline. ([eckerson.com](https://www.eckerson.com/articles/developing-a-robust-data-quality-strategy-for-your-data-pipeline-workflows?utm_source=openai))

6. **"REIN: A Comprehensive Benchmark Framework for Data Cleaning Methods in ML Pipelines" by Abdelaal et al.**: This research introduces a benchmark framework to evaluate the impact of various data cleaning methods on machine learning models. It examines 38 error detection and repair methods across multiple ML models and datasets, providing insights into the effectiveness of different cleaning techniques. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.04702?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Step-E: A Differentiable Data Cleaning Framework for Robust Learning with Noisy Labels" by Du**: This paper presents Step-E, a framework that integrates sample selection and model learning into a single optimization process. It addresses the challenges of noisy labels and outliers in training data, proposing an online curriculum that focuses on easy and consistent examples while ignoring persistent outliers. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.17040?utm_source=openai))

8. **"AlphaClean: Automatic Generation of Data Cleaning Pipelines" by Krishnan and Wu**: This research introduces AlphaClean, a framework that automates the generation of data cleaning pipelines. It focuses on parameter tuning for data cleaning, providing a library to define data quality measures and applying a generate-then-search framework to sequence cleaning operators into pipelines that maximize user-defined quality measures. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/1904.11827?utm_source=openai))

These sources offer a range of perspectives and methodologies for implementing effective data cleaning techniques in E2E pipelines, contributing to the development of robust and reliable data processing workflows.
